name: ai-zippy-child/calla-firsttime-guide
title: Calla First Time Guide
description: First Time page content grid, steps, and CTA buttons.

shortDescription.default: Whether you're coming to nourish, recharge, or simply pause - we've designed every detail to make your first visit feel seamless, warm, and exactly right.

guideHeading.default: Your first visit, step by step

step1Text.default: Reserve your spot online or via WhatsApp. Choose between Nourish, Recharge, or both - and let us know if you have any questions before you arrive.

step2Text.default: Head to the front desk when you arrive. Our team will welcome you, walk you through the space, and get you settled in.

step3Text.default: Come as you are. Towels and lockers are included with every session. You're welcome to bring a change of clothes and your favourite playlist.

step4Text.default: Take your time. Move between our cafe, sauna, mineral baths, and relaxation areas at your own pace. This is your time.

step5Text.default: Speak to our team about memberships, upcoming events, or anything else you'd like to know. We'd love to see you again.
